## Checklist

- [ ] Backend changes pass `ruff check` and `ruff format --check`
- [ ] Mobile changes pass `tsc --noEmit` and ESLint
- [ ] New ML logic is covered by at least one test or eval script
- [ ] No secrets or model weights committed
- [ ] PR title is descriptive enough to appear in a changelog
